description: R84 fresh04 cohort-A-style divergence-carrier re-evaluation (5-run depth). Outcome: A.same_failure_only with class=timeout; R83 phase divergence did not reproduce; closure_status NOT evaluated.

summary.accounting_note: divergence_run_count counts runs (a run is a divergence run iff it carries any of the four phase labels app_pre_post_diverged, app_minimal_diverged, minimal_transport_diverged, bridge_io_diverged); divergence_phase_label_count counts phase-label occurrences across those divergence runs (a single run can carry multiple phase labels). label_counts above is per-occurrence, matching divergence_phase_label_breakdown.

phase_probe_supporting_evidence.note: Phase probe ran in all 5 attempts. The matrix-level result is authoritative; phase data is supporting only.

interpretation: Fresh04 only: 5 matrix runs total; no fresh05, no cohort C, no other fresh nodes, no Hysteria2, no WS/plain-VLESS.

All 5 matrix runs returned status=completed with identical labels probe_io_all_timeout + reality_all_timeout. Class breakdown uniformly timeout (45 timeouts / 9 classes / 5 runs). divergence_phase_label_count=0.
matrix-level run_health: run_same_failure=5, run_divergence=0, run_all_ok=0, run_unknown=0. Cohort-A-style verdict: A.same_failure_only with class=timeout.

R83 app_minimal_diverged event did NOT reproduce in 5 runs at this depth. The cohort-A-style hypothesis (R83 evidenced a stable phase divergence carrier behavior in fresh04) is FALSIFIED. fresh04 is best understood as a timeout-class same_failure candidate with one transient mixed round (R83).

Closure semantics (per prompt v2): R84 is NOT a closure attempt round and closure_status.evaluated=false. The broken closure chain at R83 is permanent; R78 and R82 cannot be patched together with R84 to form a 3-round longer-repeat. If a fresh closure attempt is desired, R84 would be round 1 of a new sequence requiring two more authorized rounds.
Pre-gate (intake + dry-run + R81 subset_schema_gate with empty violations) all passed.

BHV 52/56 unchanged. Not sampler/dataplane regression. Not dual-kernel parity completion. Closure scope is strictly per-outbound + per-class; R84 is cohort-A-style re-evaluation and does not affect the 6 historical stable same-failure outbounds (HK/JP/UK/US-A-BGP).

fresh04_r73_r78_r80_r82_r83_r84_comparis.assessment: R84 produced 5/5 run_same_failure with uniform timeout class. R83's app_minimal_diverged event did not reproduce in 5 runs. The cohort-A-style re-evaluation purpose of R84 (test whether R83 was a stable phase divergence carrier) is FALSIFIED: fresh04 does NOT carry stable phase divergence at the 5-run depth. fresh04 is best read as a timeout-class same_failure candidate with one transient mixed round (R83). The broken closure chain at R83 is permanent; R78 and R82 cannot be patched together with R84 to form a 3-round longer-repeat. If fresh04 cohort-B closure is desired, a fresh sequence starting with R84 as round 1 plus two more authorized rounds would be needed.

closure_status.reason: fresh04 was reclassified to cohort-A-style at R83; closure semantics apply only to cohort-B single-outbound + single-class consecutive 3-round longer-repeat. R84 is a cohort-A-style re-evaluation round and does not re-enter the closure-counting framework even though it produced 5/5 run_same_failure(timeout).
closure_status.next_closure_attempt_would_require: Two more authorized rounds beyond R84 with 5/5 run_same_failure and matching same_failure_class to form a fresh 3-round consecutive sequence (R84 round 1, plus two more). R78 and R82 are NOT counted toward this fresh sequence because R83 broke the chain.

cohort_a_style_assessment.rationale: 5/5 run_same_failure with uniform timeout class. R83 phase divergence (app_minimal_diverged) did not reproduce. fresh04 phase-divergence-carrier hypothesis (the cohort-A-style re-evaluation purpose of R84) is FALSIFIED at the 5-run depth. fresh04 is best understood as a stable timeout-class same_failure candidate; the R83 event is treated as transient noise, not a structural carrier signature.
cohort_a_style_assessment.next_handling: Do NOT auto-extend R84. fresh04's class behavior over 5 rounds is now: other(R73) -> timeout(R78) -> matrix_error(R80) -> timeout(R82) -> mixed(R83) -> timeout(R84). A future round could start a NEW closure-counting sequence (R84 = round 1, future rounds = round 2 and 3); this requires two more authorized rounds. cohort C round-2 and the 6 R73 unselected recovery nodes are independent and remain the natural next-step candidates.

classification.label: 5/5 run_same_failure (uniform timeout); R83 app_minimal_diverged was a single transient event and did not reproduce in 5 runs; fresh04 returns to looking like a timeout-class same_failure candidate but the broken closure chain is NOT restarted by R84
classification.rationale: All 5 fresh04 matrix runs returned status=completed with identical labels probe_io_all_timeout + reality_all_timeout (run_same_failure, class=timeout). Class breakdown is uniformly timeout (45 = 9 classes x 5 runs). divergence_phase_label_count=0; the R83 app_minimal_diverged event did NOT reproduce. Per prompt v2 cohort-A-style classification, this is A.same_failure_only with class=timeout. fresh04's R83 phase divergence is best read as a single transient event, not a stable phase divergence carrier behavior. Closure-counting rule (per the R82/R83 prompt-v2 refinement): the broken chain at R83 cannot be patched by R84; closure_status is NOT evaluated this round, and any future closure attempt for fresh04 timeout-class would have to start a fresh sequence with R84 as round 1 (requiring two more authorized rounds to reach the 3-round longer-repeat threshold).
classification.next_handling: Do NOT auto-extend R84. fresh04's class behavior over 5 rounds is now: other(R73) -> timeout(R78) -> matrix_error(R80) -> timeout(R82) -> mixed(R83) -> timeout(R84). A future round could start a NEW closure-counting sequence (R84 = round 1, future rounds = round 2 and 3); this requires two more authorized rounds. cohort C round-2 and the 6 R73 unselected recovery nodes are independent and remain the natural next-step candidates.
classification.closure_scope: fresh04 cohort-A-style re-evaluation (closure not evaluated this round)

redaction_notes: Evidence uses only neutral outbound key fresh04.
Raw tag/server/uuid/public_key/short_id/path/header/server_name/password material remains only in local /tmp inputs and is not committed.
subset_schema_gate.violations is committed only because it is the empty array; structural redaction (violations carry only path/field/reason) is preserved.
